instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions prior to 7.3.7 allows a remote attacker to hijack the authentication of administrators and conduct arbitrary operations via a specially crafted web page.
output: A CSRF vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions before 7.3.7 permits remote attackers to compromise administrator authentication and perform unauthorized actions through a maliciously crafted webpage.
